productName: Journeyman CBG Pineapple Lemonade (100mg THC/100mg CBG)
description: Lush sweet-tart lemonade gummies made with a chef’s touch — vivid fruit flavor, a melt-into-chew texture, and a cannabis infusion blended cleanly into every bite. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBG to support daytime focus and clarity. The flavor does the inviting, and the cannabis infusion follows with a smooth finish.
